module.name: qr
module.description: Generates a QR code (offline, no internet) from the BODY text — the content between the directive and @end. Using the body means URLs with commas, "=", "&" or quotes are encoded verbatim (they would otherwise break the comma-separated argument syntax). Choose error-correction level, pixel size, quiet-zone margin, colors and an optional caption. Emitted as inline SVG, so it shows in thumbnails, PDF export and presenter too.
module.aiSpec:
Generate a scannable QR code fully offline (e.g. to link a slide to a URL). Block module: put the data to encode (URL or text) in the body, between the directive and @end — this lets URLs with commas, "=", "&" or quotes encode verbatim without breaking the comma-separated arg syntax. Parameters: `caption` (text) — optional label shown below the code. `ec` (select L|M|Q|H, default M) — error-correction level; higher = more robust but denser. `size` (number px 48-800, default 180) — rendered width/height. `margin` (number 0-16, default 4) — quiet-zone margin, in QR modules. `dark` (color, default #000000) — module (foreground) color. `light` (color, default #ffffff) — background; use "transparent" for none. `align` (select left|center|right, default center) — horizontal alignment. `text` (text) — fallback data used only when the body is empty. `border` (boolean, default false) — draw a bordered, padded frame around the code. `radius` (number px 0-48, default 0) — round the code's corners. `captionsize` (select small|normal|large, default normal) — caption font size.
<!-- @qr ec: M, size: 200, caption: Scan to open, border: true --> https://github.com/kjmtks <!-- @end -->

param.name: caption
param.label: Caption
param.desc: Optional label shown below the QR code.

param.name: ec
param.label: Error correction
param.desc: Error-correction level; higher survives more damage but packs denser.

param.name: size
param.label: Size (px)
param.desc: Rendered width and height of the code in pixels.

param.name: margin
param.label: Quiet-zone margin (modules)
param.desc: Blank border around the code, measured in QR modules.

param.name: light
param.label: Background
param.desc: Background color; use Transparent for none.

param.name: align
param.label: Alignment
param.desc: Horizontal alignment of the code within the slide.

param.name: text
param.label: Text (fallback)
param.desc: Used only when the body is empty. Prefer the body for anything with commas or special characters.

param.name: border
param.label: Border
param.desc: Draw a bordered, padded frame around the code.

param.name: radius
param.label: Corner radius (px)
param.desc: Round the code's corners; keep small so it stays scannable.

param.name: captionsize
param.label: Caption size
param.desc: Font size of the caption line.

snippet.label: QR code (with caption)
snippet.text: <!-- @qr ec: M, size: 180, caption: Scan to open --> https://github.com/kjmtks <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: QR from the body URL/text, with a caption. ec: L|M|Q|H.
